subcodes.first_line: O blessed souls! The illustrious letter, which was the trace of the pen of divine attraction, hath arrived. Praise be unto God that the friends [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای نفوس مبارکه نامه نامی که اثر خامه انجذاب رحمانی بود رسید الحمد لله که یاران
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @spiritual assemblies; administrative matters, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @praise and encouragement
